messages.text:
Namaste 🙏
Welcome to the divine journey of Maa Umiya at the Vishv Umiya Foundation.
Umiya Dham is being developed as one of the tallest temples in the world, symbolizing strength, devotion, and cultural pride, and spreading a message of unity and spirituality.
At Vishv Umiya Foundation, the mission is to uplift society through spirituality, education, healthcare, and community service, creating a better and brighter future for all.
"Thank you for connecting with...
Okay, so what are the goals and missions of the Viswamya Foundation?

The Vishv Umiya Foundation is dedicated to spiritual growth, social upliftment, and community harmony.It works to empower lives through education, healthcare, and humanitarian service.At its heart, the foundation builds Umiya Dham as a global center of peace, faith, and cultural unity.Would you like to know how you can be part of this sacred mission?
Yes, what are the sacred missions of the Vishwamya Foundation?

The sacred mission of the Vishv Umiya Foundation is to spread love, unity, and devotion through Maa Umiya’s divine presence.It supports education, healthcare, and community service to uplift every soul.It also builds Umiya Dham as a beacon of peace and spiritual strength for the world.Would you like to explore how you can connect with this divine journey?
Okay, thank you.
You're very welcome 🙏May Maa Umiya bless you with peace and joy.Feel free to visit our website anytime to...

transcriptSnippet: The conversation centered on the Vishv Umiya Foundation. The agent introduced the foundation's mission to uplift society through spirituality, education, healthcare, and community service, highlighting the development of Umiya Dham as a global center of peace and cultural unity. The user sought clarification on the foundation's goals and sacred missions, which the agent reiterated as spreading love, unity, and devotion, and empowering lives through various services.

Every soul is connected to divinity by design. You're here because your heart may be drawn to peace, purpose, or a deeper spiritual journey.
No, I'm not interested to connect with you.
Thank you for your time. Maa Umiya bless you 🙏

Yes, thank you.
You're very welcome 🙏 May your journey be filled with peace and divine grace.

transcriptSnippet: The conversation began with the agent from Vishv Umiya Foundation introducing itself and offering information about Maa Umiya and their mission in English, Hindi, or Gujarati. After a brief misunderstanding where the user inquired about an accident, the user confirmed interest in the message and chose Gujarati. The agent then explained about Umiya Dham and the Foundation's work. The user expressed a desire to join the team, provided their name (Arunankit Patel) and contact number (884819792), and the agent confirmed that their team would follow up.

transcriptSnippet: The conversation involves an agent from the Vishv Umiya Foundation reaching out to a user to share information about Maa Umiya and the foundation's mission. The user prefers to communicate in Hindi and expresses interest in learning more about the foundation and joining the team. The agent provides a brief overview of the foundation's focus on spirituality, education, health, and community upliftment, and mentions the development of Umiya Dham as a symbol of faith and unity. The user is directed to the foundation's website for further information and is assured that the team will contact them soon. The conversation concludes with the agent expressing gratitude and offering blessings.

धन्यवाद 🙏आप किस भाषा में सुनना पसंद करेंगे — हिंदी, अंग्रेजी, या गुजराती?क्या आप एक संक्षिप्त संदेश...

धन्यवाद 🙏उमिया धाम दुनिया के सबसे ऊंचे मंदिरों में से एक के रूप में विकसित किया जा रहा है, जो आस्था, एकता और भक्ति का प्रतीक है।विश्व उमिया फाउंडेशन सामाजिक कल्याण, शिक्षा, स्वास्थ्य और आध्यात्मिक विकास के माध्यम से समाज की सेवा करता है।क्या आप अधिक जानकारी चाहेंगे या हमारी टीम से जुड़ना चाहेंगे?
हाँ, मैं अधिक जानकारी चाह-- अ, लेना चाहता हूँ।

वाह बहुत अच्छा 🙏 आपको अधिक जानकारी चाहिए, तो बताता हूँ — उमिया धाम एक ऐतिहासिक और आध्यात्मिक केंद्र के रूप में विकसित किया जा रहा है, जो भारत के अहमदाबाद में स्थित है। यह न केवल एक मंदिर है, बल्कि एक विशाल सामाजिक और आध्यात्मिक केंद्र है, जो शिक्षा, स्वास्थ्य सेवाएं, ग्रामीण विकास और युवा सशक्तिकरण में लगी हुई है।आप वेबसाइट पर जाकर अधिक जानकारी प्राप्त कर सकते हैं — https://www.vuf.org/क्या आप चाहेंगे कि मैं आपको हमारी टीम से जोड़ दूं?
हाँ, please आपकी टीम से जोड़ दीजिए।धन्यवाद।
वाह बहुत अच्छा 🙏 आपको हमारी टीम से जोड़ा जा रहा है।एक मिनट का इंतजार कीजिए, आपको तुरंत संपर्क किया जाएगा।धन्यवाद आपके समय के लिए।माँ उमिया आप और आपके परिवार को आशीर्वाद दे।शुभ दिन हो।जय माँ उमिया 🙏

transcriptSnippet:
The conversation began with the agent from Vishv Umiya Foundation introducing their mission and Umiya Dham, offering language choices. The user selected Gujarati and initially expressed interest in connecting with the team.

Subsequently, the user inquired about "Omnia Dam," which the agent clarified as "Umiya Dham." The agent then provided detailed information about Umiya Dham as one of the world's tallest temples, symbolizing faith, unity, and devotion, and its role as a center for spiritual growth, education, healthcare, and community service through the Vishv Umiya Foundation. The conversation concluded with the agent offering further information via their website.
